Analysis: The model with increased capacity (hidden_channels=80) and 10 epochs of training has shown good results. Since the model was still improving after 10 epochs, training for more epochs (perhaps 15-20) could lead to better performance. This approach is less risky than changing the architecture and allows me to leverage the already successful model configuration.

Decision: I'll train the model for 15 epochs to see if performance continues to improve. This is a moderate increase from the current 10 epochs and should fit within the remaining time budget.
